---
title: "Team"
description: "People in the Cancer Data Science Laboratory"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/build_team_page.py. Edit content/team/. -->
::: {.team-page}
::: {.hero .team-hero style="--hero-image: url('content/images/team-hero.png');"}
::: {.hero-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">Team</p>
<h1>Different backgrounds, shared questions.</h1>
<p>Our laboratory is based in Trieste. Some members work across partner institutes and are co-supervised with collaborating principal investigators.</p>
:::
:::


<section class="team-section"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Leadership</p><h2>Principal investigator</h2></div><div class="team-grid team-grid-featured"><article class="team-card team-card-pi" data-profile="giulio-caravagna.md"><img src="content/team/images/giulio-caravagna-v2.png" alt="Giulio Caravagna"><div><span>Principal investigator</span><h3>Giulio Caravagna, PhD</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:gcaravagna@units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a><a href="https://app.reclaim.ai/m/giulio-caravagna" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Meet Giulio</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Cancer evolution and tumour phylogenetics</li><li>Machine learning for cancer genomics</li><li>Bayesian inference and computational oncology</li><li>Treatment resistance and disease forecasting</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Positions</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Associate Professor, Department of Mathematics and Geosciences, University of Trieste</li><li>Core Faculty, PhD programme in Applied Data Science &amp; Artificial Intelligence, University of Trieste</li><li>Adjunct Faculty, PhD programme in Theoretical and Scientific Data Science, SISSA</li><li>Honorary Fellow, The Institute of Cancer Research, UK</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Training</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>2017–20, The Institute of Cancer Research, UK, with Andrea Sottoriva</li><li>2015–17, University of Edinburgh, UK, with Guido Sanguinetti</li><li>2011–15, University of Milan-Bicocca, Italy, with Giancarlo Mauri and Marco Antoniotti</li><li>2011, PhD in Computer Science, University of Pisa</li><li>BSc and MSc in Computer Science, University of Pisa</li></ul></div></details></div></article></div></section>

<section class="team-section team-section-tinted"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Scientists</p><h2>Postdoctoral researchers</h2></div><div class="team-grid"><article class="team-card" data-profile="nicola-calonaci.md"><img src="content/team/images/nicola-calonaci.jpg" alt="Nicola Calonaci"><div><h3>Nicola Calonaci</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:nicola.calonaci@units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Statistical physics of biological systems</li><li>Computational oncology</li><li>Probabilistic modelling of tumour evolution</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>2021, PhD in Physics and Chemistry of Biological Systems, SISSA.</li><li>MSc in Physics, University of Pisa.</li><li>BSc in Physics, University of Pisa.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="alice-antonello.md"><img src="content/team/images/alice-antonello.jpg" alt="Alice Antonello"><div><h3>Alice Antonello</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:alice.antonello@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/189363" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Timing the onset of therapy resistance after Allo-HSCT in AML using Bayesian inference" aria-label="PhD thesis: Timing the onset of therapy resistance after Allo-HSCT in AML using Bayesian inference"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Therapy resistance in acute myeloid leukaemia</li><li>Bayesian inference</li><li>Longitudinal cancer genomics</li><li>Quantitative and computational biology</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>AIRC Postdoctoral Fellow (independent fellowship).</p><ul><li>2025, PhD in Applied Data Science &amp; Artificial Intelligence, University of Trieste.</li><li>MSc in Quantitative and Computational Biology, University of Trento.</li><li>BSc in Biotechnology, University of Turin.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="elena-buscaroli.md"><img src="content/team/images/elena-buscaroli.jpg" alt="Elena Buscaroli"><div><h3>Elena Buscaroli</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:elena.buscaroli@units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/357311" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Bayesian inference of lineage evolution and molecular profiling in cancer and gene therapy" aria-label="PhD thesis: Bayesian inference of lineage evolution and molecular profiling in cancer and gene therapy"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Bayesian inference of lineage evolution</li><li>Cancer molecular profiling</li><li>Gene therapy</li><li>Single-cell and high-throughput sequencing</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>MSc in Data Science and Scientific Computing, University of Trieste.</li><li>BSc in Genetics, University of Bologna.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="lucrezia-valeriani.md"><img src="content/team/images/lucrezia-valeriani.jpg" alt="Lucrezia Valeriani"><div><h3>Lucrezia Valeriani</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:lucrezia.valeriani@units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/357309" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Computational modelling of the interplay between genetic and epigenetic in tumour evolution" aria-label="PhD thesis: Computational modelling of the interplay between genetic and epigenetic in tumour evolution"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Genetic and epigenetic tumour evolution</li><li>Computational cancer genomics</li><li>Machine learning for molecular data</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>MSc in Data Science and Scientific Computing, University of Trieste.</li><li>BSc in Genetics, University of Bologna.</li></ul></div></details></div></article></div></section>

<section class="team-section"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Researchers in training</p><h2>PhD researchers</h2></div><div class="team-grid"><article class="team-card" data-profile="davide-testa.md"><img src="content/team/images/davide-testa.jpg" alt="Davide Testa"><div><span>ADSAI · 2025–28</span><h3>Davide Testa</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:davide.testa@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Computational immunology</li><li>Allogeneic transplantation</li><li>Cancer evolution and treatment response</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>Co-supervised with Luca Vago at IRCCS San Raffaele.</p><ul><li>Medicine, University of Pisa.</li><li>Specialty in Immunology, University of Pisa.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="giorgia-gandolfi.md"><img src="content/team/images/giorgia-gandolfi.jpg" alt="Giorgia Gandolfi"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Giorgia Gandolfi</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:giorgia.gandolfi@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Cancer bioinformatics</li><li>Machine learning for tumour profiling</li><li>High-throughput sequencing</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>Sponsored by IRCCS San Raffaele and co-supervised with Giovanni Tonon.</p><ul><li>MSc in Bioinformatics, University of Bologna.</li><li>BSc in Biology, University of Parma.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="virginia-gazziero.md"><img src="content/team/images/virginia-gazziero.jpg" alt="Virginia Gazziero"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Virginia Gazziero</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:virginia.gazziero@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Functional genomics</li><li>Cancer immunology</li><li>Machine learning for molecular data</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>Sponsored by Toscana Life Sciences and co-supervised with Anna Kabanova.</p><ul><li>MSc in Functional Genomics, University of Trieste.</li><li>BSc in Biotechnology, University of Insubria.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="eriseld-krasniqi.md"><img src="content/team/images/eriseld-krasniqi.jpg" alt="Eriseld Krasniqi"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Eriseld Krasniqi</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:eriseld.krasniqi@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Clinical oncology</li><li>Precision medicine</li><li>Machine learning for clinical and genomic cancer data</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>Sponsored by the IRCCS Regina Elena National Cancer Institute.</p><ul><li>Degree in Medicine and Surgery, University of Rome Tor Vergata.</li><li>Specialty in Medical Oncology, University of Rome Tor Vergata.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="azad-sadr.md"><img src="content/team/images/azad-sadr-correct.jpg" alt="Azad Sadr"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Azad Sadr</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:azad.sadr@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Machine learning</li><li>Computational modelling</li><li>Optimisation and data-driven methods in cancer research</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>MSc in Industrial Engineering, Wayne State University, USA.</li><li>BSc in Industrial Engineering, Kar Higher Education Institute, Iran.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="sara-cocomello.md"><img src="content/team/images/sara-cocomello-correct.jpg" alt="Sara Cocomello"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Sara Cocomello</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:sara.cocomello@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Statistical learning</li><li>Cancer data science</li><li>Computational modelling</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>MSc in Data Science and Scientific Computing, University of Trieste.</li><li>BSc in Economics.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="elena-rivaroli.md"><img src="content/team/images/elena-rivaroli-correct.jpg" alt="Elena Rivaroli"><div><span>ADSAI · 2024–27</span><h3>Elena Rivaroli</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:elena.rivaroli@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Machine learning</li><li>Cancer genomics</li><li>Scientific computing</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>MSc in Data Science and Scientific Computing, University of Trieste.</li><li>BSc in Computer Engineering.</li></ul></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="edoardo-insaghi.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">EI</div><div><span>ADSAI · 2025–28</span><h3>Edoardo Insaghi</h3><div class="team-links"><a href="mailto:edoardo.insaghi@phd.units.it"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a></div><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Statistical learning</li><li>Bayesian modelling</li><li>Applied data science</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>Co-supervised with Leonardo Egidi.</p></div></details></div></article></div></section>

<section class="team-section team-section-tinted"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Students</p><h2>MSc and BSc researchers</h2></div><div class="team-grid"><article class="team-card" data-profile="eleonora-tiozzo.md"><img src="content/team/images/eleonora-tiozzo.png" alt="Eleonora Tiozzo"><div><span>MSc · 2026</span><h3>Eleonora Tiozzo</h3><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Data science</li><li>Scientific computing</li><li>Computational oncology</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>MSc programme in Data Science and Scientific Computing. Co-supervised with Nicola Calonaci.</p></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card" data-profile="fabio-zinzone.md"><img src="content/team/images/fabio-zinzone-correct.jpg" alt="Fabio Zinzone"><div><span>AIRC4Youth · MSc · 2025</span><h3>Fabio Zinzone</h3><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>Physics</li><li>Cancer data science</li><li>Computational oncology</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>MSc programme in Physics. Co-supervised with Giorgia Gandolfi.</p></div></details></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="lorenzo-bottelli.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">LB</div><div><span>AIRC4Youth · UniUPO · 2026</span><h3>Lorenzo Bottelli</h3><details class="team-background"><summary>Research interests</summary><div class="team-background-content"><ul><li>To be updated.</li></ul></div></details><details class="team-background"><summary>Background</summary><div class="team-background-content"><p>TBD</p></div></details></div></article></div></section>

<section class="team-section"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Visitors</p><h2>Visiting PhD researchers</h2></div><div class="team-grid team-grid-compact"><article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="daniel-colic.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">DC</div><div><span>2024</span><h3>Daniel Colic</h3><p>Frank Supek’s group · Institute for Research in Biomedicine, Barcelona.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="carmen-oroperv.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">CO</div><div><span>2024</span><h3>Carmen Oroperv</h3><p>Søren Besenbacher’s group · Aarhus University.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="nair-varela-ruoco.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">NV</div><div><span>2023</span><h3>Nair Varela Ruoco</h3><p>David Posada’s group · Biomedical Research Centre, University of Vigo.</p></div></article></div></section>

<section class="team-section team-section-tinted"><div class="team-section-title"><p class="eyebrow">Where they are now</p><h2>Alumni</h2></div><div class="team-grid team-grid-compact"><article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="giovanni-santacatterina.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">GS</div><div><span>PhD researcher</span><h3>Giovanni Santacatterina</h3><p>Postdoc at St. Anna Children’s Cancer Research Institute, Vienna.</p><div class="team-links"><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/357310" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Bayesian and computational modelling for evolutionary cancer dynamics: from coarse dynamics to single-cell resolution" aria-label="PhD thesis: Bayesian and computational modelling for evolutionary cancer dynamics: from coarse dynamics to single-cell resolution"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="katsiaryna-davydzenka.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">KD</div><div><span>PhD researcher</span><h3>Katsiaryna Davydzenka</h3><p>Current position to be confirmed.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="alumnus-nicola-cortinovis.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">NC</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Nicola Cortinovis</h3><p>Current position to be confirmed.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="andrea-buscema.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">AB</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Andrea Buscema</h3><p>Current position to be confirmed.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="alumnus-riccardo-bergamin.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">RB</div><div><span>Postdoctoral researcher</span><h3>Riccardo Bergamin</h3><p>Current position to be confirmed.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="alumnus-salvatore-milite.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">SM</div><div><span>PhD researcher</span><h3>Salvatore Milite</h3><p>AI Scientist at GSK, Zurich.</p><div class="team-links"><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/353687" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Probabilistic and deep learning approaches to modeling biological systems" aria-label="PhD thesis: Probabilistic and deep learning approaches to modeling biological systems"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="brandon-hastings.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">BH</div><div><span>Research associate</span><h3>Brandon Hastings</h3><p>PhD researcher at the University of Nottingham.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="emanuele-ruoppolo.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">ER</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Emanuele Ruoppolo</h3><p>PhD researcher at Helmholtz Munich.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="arianna-tasciotti.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">AT</div><div><span>PhD researcher</span><h3>Arianna Tasciotti</h3><p>AI Engineer at Leonardo S.p.A.</p><div class="team-links"><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/195483" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Superspreading dynamics in epidemics: a deep learning and Bayesian inference framework for detection and characterization" aria-label="PhD thesis: Superspreading dynamics in epidemics: a deep learning and Bayesian inference framework for detection and characterization"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="lucrezia-patruno.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">LP</div><div><span>PhD researcher</span><h3>Lucrezia Patruno</h3><p>Postdoctoral researcher at University College London.</p><div class="team-links"><a class="team-thesis" href="https://tesidottorato.depositolegale.it/handle/20.500.14242/74590" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Computational strategies for single-cell multi-omics data analysis and integration" aria-label="PhD thesis: Computational strategies for single-cell multi-omics data analysis and integration"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> PhD thesis</a></div></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="lorenzo-taroni.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">LT</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Lorenzo Taroni</h3><p>Software developer at Advancia Technology.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="abdula-khalus.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">AK</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Abdula Khalus</h3><p>Software developer at AI Factory.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="clara-canavese.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">CC</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Clara Canavese</h3><p>PhD researcher at SISSA and Human Technopole.</p></div></article>
<article class="team-card team-card-text" data-profile="francesco-favagrossa.md"><div class="team-photo-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">FF</div><div><span>Student</span><h3>Francesco Favagrossa</h3><p>Current position to be confirmed.</p></div></article></div></section>

:::
